privileged_info_summary: This task operates on a synthetic travel database created by seed_demodb.py. Four record updates are required: (1) Hotel Artemide: change Stars from 4 to 5; (2) The Savoy: change Phone from +44-20-7836-4343 to +44-20-7836-5555; (3) Copacabana Palace: change Type from Historic to Palace; (4) Luca Rossi profile: change Surname from Rossi to De Rossi. All target values, field names, record identifiers, and database structure have been verified against the seed data source code.
